`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

## Summary

Added the ability to remove projects from the project list in the left-hand sidebar panel. The implementation includes:

1. **Delete button**: A trash icon that appears on hover for each project
2. **Confirmation dialog**: Asks user to confirm and clarifies it only removes from the list (doesn't delete the actual repository)
3. **Loading state**: Prevents duplicate deletion attempts while processing
4. **Error handling**: Shows alerts for any deletion failures
5. **Clean UX**: Button only appears on hover to keep the UI uncluttered

The feature integrates with the existing backend DELETE endpoint at `/api/projects/:id` and automatically updates all connected clients via WebSocket broadcasts.

https://github.com/jess-bergs/agent-kanban/pull/5
